profile.name: Nicky Liu
profile.bio: I'm Nicky Liu, a full-stack engineer at ZEDOTECH in Taiwan who designs and ships end-to-end web apps that pair modern frontends with .NET backends. I build REST/WebSocket APIs and OAuth flows (see google-oauth-sample), create interactive visualizations and static portfolios (git-folio), and assemble automation and audio pipelines — including Whisper-based speech-to-text and AI-driven content generation — to turn prototypes into deployable products.

repos.name: git-folio
repos.description: 從 GitHub 自動生成 AI 驅動的個人作品集網站。抓取所有 repos、用 AI 撰寫描述、生成完整可部署的 Astro + Tailwind CSS 靜態網站。

repos.name: auto-blog
repos.description: Facebook, Instagram, Threads 自動化貼文

repos.name: whisper-opencc
repos.description: 透過 [faster-whisper](https://github.com/SYSTRAN/faster-whisper) 進行語音辨識，並自動將結果轉換為繁體中文 SRT 字幕檔。

repos.name: music-vizualizer
repos.description: 一個基於 Python 的音樂可視化工具，能夠根據音頻波形自動生成帶有動態圓形波形效果的視頻。

repos.name: music-merge
repos.description: 將多個 `.wav` 音樂檔案串接合併成一個，保持原始音質零損失。

repos.name: silvercore-ai
repos.description: SilverCore 提供完整的商家管理解決方案，包含角色權限控管、即時通知、多語言支援， 讓您輕鬆管理旗下所有商家與操作人員。

skills.name: Full-Stack Web Development
skills.description: Designs and implements full-stack web apps combining modern frontend frameworks and server-side .NET backends, delivering end-to-end features and deployable prototypes.

skills.name: API Design & Integration
skills.description: Builds and integrates REST/WebSocket APIs and third‑party auth flows, connecting frontend apps, backend services, and external platforms (OAuth, AI APIs).

skills.name: Front-end UI & Visualizations
skills.description: Creates interactive, responsive UIs and custom visualizations with strong CSS/Tailwind/Canvas usage for dashboards, stores, and data-driven displays.

skills.name: .NET & C# Application Development
skills.description: Develops production-oriented and prototype server components, libraries and console apps on the .NET platform with ASP.NET Core and .NET 5/6.

skills.name: Automation & Chatbots
skills.description: Implements automation pipelines and conversational bots that post to social platforms and interact via messaging APIs, often combined with AI.

skills.name: Audio Processing & Speech-to-Text
skills.description: Works with audio pipelines for waveform visualization, lossless WAV merging and speech‑to‑text subtitle generation using Whisper toolchains.

skills.name: Static Site Generation & Content Automation
skills.description: Automates content collection and generation to produce AI-driven, deployable static sites and portfolios from GitHub data.
